consistency_check.mechanics_integrity: High. The description clearly outlines the primary effect (ending curses) and a specific edge case regarding cursed magic items and attunement.

quality_assessment.usefulness: High. Essential for dealing with detrimental magical effects.
quality_assessment.notes: The specific clarification regarding cursed magic items (breaking attunement but not removing the curse itself) is crucial and well-documented.

mechanics_review.range: Touch (Appropriate for direct contact required to end a curse)
mechanics_review.duration: Instantaneous (Appropriate for an effect that resolves immediately upon casting)
mechanics_review.effect_summary: Ends all curses on one creature or object, potentially allowing a cursed item to be unequipped.
mechanics_review.class_availability: Standard mix for removal/abjuration magic (Cleric, Paladin, Warlock, Wizard).

analysis.suggested_improvements: None required. The data is clean and mechanically sound.
